items.title: Trump Administration Reportedly Exploring Taking Stakes In Quantum Computing Companies— IonQ, Rigetti And D-Wave Discussing Move
items.description: The Trump administration is reportedly in talks to take equity stakes in U.S. quantum computing firms like IonQ, Rigetti, and D-Wave in exchange for federal funding, as part of a broader strategy of government investment in strategic tech companies.

items.title: Tesla, IBM, Quantumscape, Lam Research And Nuburu: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
items.description: Major U.S. indices closed lower on Wednesday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average down 0.7% at 46,590.41.

items.title: IBM revenue beats expectations but software growth disappoints
IBM Stock Slides Despite Earnings Beat, Boost To Sales Forecast
items.description: IBM stock slipped late Wednesday despite the tech giant reporting third-quarter results that bested expectations.  IBM also said its is seeing strong AI demand and boosted its sales forecast for the rest of the year.  "Our AI book of business now stands at more than $9.5 billion," IBM Chief Executive Arvind Krishna said in a news release.
